description: UK startup providing patient engagement and appointment booking platform for NHS trusts. Handles millions of NHS appointments through digital channels including SMS, email, and app-based booking.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to NHS trusts and healthcare providers
target_market: NHS trusts, GP practices, UK healthcare providers
competitive_advantage: Deep NHS relationships, proven at scale, digital-first patient engagement

varden_fit.rationale: NHS infrastructure player - could be partner for occupational health integration into NHS
